description: 1942 is a vertically scrolling shooter set in the Pacific Theater during World War II. The player controls a P-38 Lightning fighter plane and must battle through waves of enemy aircraft and naval vessels. The game progresses through multiple levels, each culminating in a boss fight. The objective is to survive, destroy as many enemy units as possible, and reach the end of each level. The player has a limited number of lives and a health bar which depletes as they are hit by enemy fire. The player can perform a limited number of evasive maneuvers to avoid enemy fire. Enemy aircraft and ships attack with various types of bullets and bombs, requiring skillful maneuvering to avoid collisions. The environment primarily consists of ocean landscapes with occasional islands and ships visible. There are no power-ups to collect; the game emphasizes skillful dodging and precise shooting. The game ends when the player runs out of lives, or successfully completes all levels.

controls.arrow_left: Move player plane to the left
controls.arrow_right: Move player plane to the right
controls.a: Perform evasive barrel roll maneuver (limited uses)
controls.z: Fire a special attack (uses a special attack resource)
controls.x: Changes the firing formation of the main guns
